name: Spanish

sections.label: Six Spanish Courses Beyond SPA-225
sections.description: Six Spanish courses beyond SPA-225. SPA-148 (Spanish Literature in Translation) may count as one. Up to three courses may be fulfilled through approved study abroad.

sections.label: Hispanic Literature (SPA-336 or above)
sections.description: One Hispanic Literature course numbered SPA-336 or above.

sections.label: Study Abroad (strongly encouraged)
sections.description: Students are urged to study abroad in a program approved by the College and the Department for up to three courses toward the major.

notes: SPA-148 (Spanish Literature in Translation) may count as one of the eight required courses even though it is below SPA-225. A grade of C or above is required for every course counted toward the major.
